description: Use this API to delete Time Series Power Flow profile curve by curvesetid and curvecol and index. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = purge_tspf_profilecurve(curvesetid,curvecol)

parameters.name: curvesetid
parameters.description: Profile curve number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: curvecol
parameters.description: Profile curve collumn. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: Prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
